Font size
ListPreference.android:summary: Font size used for the AI's astonishingly accurate analysis of the face
Whether to be fast and accurate or slow and unbelievably accurate

EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage: Number of seconds to spend analyzing live video of the face. Large numbers give more stable results, while small numbers give results that update more frequently.
